validation_command: python -c "import pathlib; hits=[str(f)+':'+l for d in ['scripts','docs/_canon/contratos','docs/_canon/specs'] for f in pathlib.Path(d).rglob('*') if f.suffix in ('.py','.yaml','.yml','.md','.json') and f.stat().st_size<500000 for l in f.read_text(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace').splitlines() if 'Hb Track - Fronted' in l and '[' not in l[:30]]; print('REMAINING REFS:\n'+chr(10).join(hits)) if hits else print('PASS: 0 references to Fronted in scripts/ and docs/_canon/')"
